nasb.text: Moreover, the Lord showed great and distressing signs and wonders before our eyes against Egypt, Pharaoh and all his household;

esv.text: And the Lord showed signs and wonders, great and grievous, against Egypt and against Pharaoh and all his household, before our eyes.

cnv.text: 耶和華在我們眼前，把又偉大又厲害的神蹟奇事行在埃及、法老和他全家的身上；

ccb.text: 我们亲眼看见耶和华行伟大而可畏的神迹奇事，惩罚埃及和法老全家。
